pattern: A breadth-first sweep that records the first node of every level leaves the answer sitting in the first node of the deepest level.
hints: The last row is simply the deepest level reached during a level-by-level traversal.
Process the tree level by level; the leftmost node of a level is the first one you visit on that level.
Keep overwriting an answer with each level's leftmost value, so after the deepest level it holds the bottom-left value.

edge_inputs.description: single node is the whole answer
balanced tree picks leftmost of last row
deepest leaf hangs off the right side
right-skewed chain ends in a single deepest node
negative leftmost value at the bottom

stress.description: random level-order tree with holes to vary the deepest level position
stress.note: root forced non-null so the tree always exists
